data.title: Augmented and Virtual Reality Market projected to reach $138.60 billion by 2032, growing at 19.2% CAGR from 2025 ($40.62 billion).
data.description: A report by MarketsandMarkets™ predicts that the Augmented and Virtual Reality Market is projected to soar to USD 138.60 billion by 2032, up from USD 40.62 billion in 2025, representing a compound annual growth rate (CAGR) of 19.2% from 2025 to 2032. The report includes 150 market data tables and 50 figures for detailed analysis and insights.

data.title: High Protein Powders Market to reach $49.6 billion by 2035, up from $27 billion in 2025, driven by fitness trends.
data.description: In Newark, Delaware, a significant transformation is taking place in the performance nutrition industry. As per the most recent market forecast, the High Protein Powders Market is anticipated to witness substantial growth, increasing from USD 27 billion in 2025 to a remarkable USD 49.6 billion.

data.title: CPSC warns consumers on Miocololy Self-Feeding Pillows due to serious risks. View warnings at www.cpsc.gov.
data.description: The Consumer Product Safety Commission (CPSC) issued a warning on Jan. 15, 2026 advising consumers to cease using Miocololy Self-Feeding Pillows immediately. The safety alert was issued due to the potential risk of serious injuries associated with the product. Consumers can access product safety warnings and recalls at www.cpsc.gov.
Fear & Greed Index: 64/100 - Greed

data.title: ITC Infotech opens Digital & AI Engineering Hub in Riyadh, deepening commitment to Middle East.
data.description: In Riyadh, Saudi Arabia, Dubai, United Arab Emirates, and Bengaluru, India, a prominent global technology services provider, ITC Infotech, revealed the opening of their Digital & AI Engineering Hub.

data.title: ION Water and Meta collaborate to save 26M gallons of water in affordable housing communities while reducing costs.
data.description: A partnership between ION Water and Meta has been initiated in Louisville, Kentucky, with the goal of conserving water in the Brazos River Watershed. This collaboration aims to assist affordable housing communities in reducing their water expenses. Through this initiative, 26 million gallons of water are expected to be saved, contributing to both environmental protection and financial benefits for residents.

data.title: Fresh Texas tortillas now available nationwide as TXTortilla.com launches, delivering handmade tortillas and Tex-Mex seasonings.
data.description: San Antonio witnessed the launch of TXTortilla.com by TX Tortilla, a direct-to-consumer brand offering fresh, handmade Texas tortillas and bold Tex-Mex seasonings. The initiative aims to provide a solution to the issue of cold, cardboard tortillas found on grocery store shelves. The launch took place on January 15, 2026.

data.title: Kroll launches 2026 Golf Ambassador Program with PGA TOUR/LPGA stars Bud Cauley, Michael Brennan, and Jessica Korda.
data.description: In an announcement made on January 15, 2026, in New York, Kroll, a top independent provider of global financial and risk advisory solutions, showcased their dedication to excellence and ambition through a collaboration with PGA TOUR golfers Bud Cauley and Michael Brennan, along with LPGA's Jessica Korda. This partnership emphasizes Kroll's commitment to excellence and ambition in the industry.

data.title: AppGuard criticizes AI defenses, expands platform release. New profile highlights concerns over AI-enhanced malware.
data.description: In McLean, Virginia on January 15, 2026, a recent report by AppGuard has showcased a list of the Top 10 Cybersecurity Innovators, shedding light on the increasing worries surrounding AI-boosted malware. The integration of AI technology significantly heightens the challenge of identifying malware. Furthermore, these malicious programs leverage AI capabilities to evaluate, adjust, and operate swiftly compared to traditional cybersecurity measures.

data.title: Quaint Oak Bancorp, Inc. declared $0.04 quarterly dividend for shareholders on January 14, payable on February 9, 2026.
data.description: In Southampton, Pennsylvania, on January 15, 2026, Quaint Oak Bancorp, Inc., the parent company of Quaint Oak Bank, disclosed that the Board of Directors authorized a quarterly cash dividend of $0.04 per share on the Company's common stock on January 14, 2026. This dividend will be distributed on February 9, 2026, to shareholders of record as of January 26, 2026.

data.title: American Beacon Partners partners with Pender Capital to distribute Pender Real Estate Credit Fund.
data.description: American Beacon Partners, based in Irving, Texas, recently revealed a key collaboration with Pender Capital. As part of this strategic partnership, American Beacon Partners will take charge of the distribution endeavors for the Pender Real Estate Credit Fund.

data.title: Code Name: BlueSpot, a Go AI, revealed ahead of 10-year anniversary of AlphaGo-Lee Sedol match. Handicap-match events scheduled.
data.description: BlueSpot, a Go artificial intelligence program, has been revealed in advance of the upcoming handicap matches marking the 10th anniversary of the significant AlphaGo vs. Lee Sedol game. This announcement was made in New York on January 15, 2026. The program, known as Code Name: BlueSpot, is set to participate in the commemorative events.

data.title: Cove Soda appoints Bryan Crowley as CEO and Craig Olikiewicz as CCO, aiming for growth in functional soda market.
data.description: Halifax, NS - On January 15, 2026, Cove Soda appointed Craig Olikiewicz as their new Chief Commercial Officer. Olikiewicz is a seasoned sales veteran in the beverage industry. This announcement comes as the functional soda category is poised for further expansion. Bryan Crowley has concurrently been named the Chief Executive Officer and Board...

data.title: Saia consolidates freight and logistics under one name for stronger brand identity.
data.description: Consolidating our freight and logistics services under a single name enhances brand recognition and efficiency within the company. This strategic decision aims to streamline operations and foster a unified identity. The merger of these services combines a workforce of over 10,000 employees and a fleet of 2,500 vehicles. This move is projected to generate cost savings of approximately $5 million annually. The rebranding effort is part of a broader initiative to enhance customer experience and expand market reach.

data.title: Kuli Kuli introduces organic Moringa capsules as top wellness trend for 2026, expanding superfood lineup.
data.description: A prominent moringa company in the U.S. is broadening its selection of superfoods by introducing convenient daily capsules. Headquartered in Oakland, California, Kuli Kuli Foods revealed this latest addition on January 15, 2026. The demand for moringa is on the rise, with it becoming a widely recognized functional ingredient in the year 2026. This company has been a key player in popularizing moringa in the United States.

data.title: MLB star Hunter Dozier and wife launch CorVive Kids Hydrate clean hydration formula for kids, addressing concerns about artificial ingredients in youth sports drinks - a critical need.
data.description: In PLANO, Texas, Hunter Dozier and Amanda, together with CorVive®, have introduced CorVive Kids Hydrate™, a clean hydration solution tailored for young athletes and active kids. The product is aimed at addressing the issue of artificial components found in typical youth sports drinks and the limited choices available to meet the specific nutritional requirements of children. CorVive, a family-owned sports nutrition company from Texas, developed this formula to cater to the unique needs of youngsters engaging in physical activities. Former MLB player Hunter Dozier and his spouse Amanda collaborated with CorVive to launch this product, underscoring the increasing concerns about artificial ingredients in conventional youth sports beverages.

data.title: Cisive obtains PBSA-BSOAP accreditation after audit. Leading provider of background screening services.
data.description: In Easton, Maryland on January 15, 2026, Cisive, a prominent company specializing in technology-based background screening, workforce risk management, and data services, has confirmed the successful conclusion of its accreditation audit. This achievement ensures the company's compliance with necessary standards and regulations.

data.title: ETHZilla (Nasdaq: ETHZ) to join Susquehanna's 15th Annual Tech Conference, focusing on real-world asset tokenization.
data.description: Today, in Palm Beach, Florida, ETHZilla Corporation (Nasdaq: ETHZ) revealed plans to construct institutional-grade infrastructure for real-world asset tokenization. John Saunders, CFO, and John Kristoff, SVP, will lead this initiative.
